---
title: "Devansh Sachar"
image: "files/profile.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:your_email@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
---

## 👋 Hi, I'm Devansh

I’m a **Business Analytics graduate student at UC San Diego** with experience in:

- Data Analysis & Visualization
- Workflow Automation (Alteryx, SQL)
- Predictive Modeling

---

## 🚀 What I Do

I build **data-driven solutions** that improve efficiency and decision-making.

- Automated workflows saving **hours daily across teams**
- Built dashboards used by **multiple business units**
- Applied machine learning to real-world datasets

---

## 📊 Tools & Technologies

**Languages:** Python, SQL, R
**Tools:** Power BI, Tableau, Alteryx
**Cloud:** GCP
**Other:** Excel, Data Modeling, ETL

---

## 📌 What You’ll Find Here

- 📁 Projects with real-world impact
- 📄 My professional resume
- 🧠 Blog-style case studies

---

### 🔥 Currently Seeking
Data Analyst / Business Analyst / Data Science Intern roles
